Author: AemiliusXIV
Name: ChronoLog
Punchline: OBS chapter markers and YouTube timestamps for every raid pull. Use /chrono.
Description:
Tracks pulls, wipes and clears in any duty. Per pull: fight name, phase, boss HP%, first death, duration.

Outputs OBS chapter markers via websocket, a paste-ready YouTube description block, and a direct push to a live stream's description over the YouTube Data API.

Short resets are filtered out automatically. /chrono to open, /chrono cfg for settings.
Changelog:
The big one: ChronoLog can now push timestamps straight to YouTube. Connect your own Google account once and the plugin writes each pull into your live stream's description as you go, or all at once when the duty ends. No more pasting by hand. The first connection needs a quick Google Cloud setup; the setup guide in the repo covers every step.

Also fixed: the first pull of a fight could go unrecorded when the wipe landed before the pull registered. ChronoLog now starts the pull the moment combat begins, so nothing slips through.
